name: Beast Mode: Night of the Werewolf Silver Bullet Edition
short_description: Beast Mode: Night of the Werewolf - Unleash your inner beast, rack up epic kills, and dominate the online leaderboards in this over-the-top Arcade Action spectacle!
detailed_description:
October 26th, 2024 - The Halloween Event is back. Now is your only chance to get the ultra-rare Achievement connected to this event. You've got until November 15th to find and smash all 70 of the hidden pumpkins! 

October 2023 - Beast Mode: Night of the Werewolf has now been remastered and the update is free for everyone who owns the game!

Version 3.0 has completely new gameplay with awesome special abilities, two new maps, a unique Halloween event, and several new achievements. Due to the complete overhaul of the game, the leaderboards have been reset. If you were in the top 10 of the previous leaderboards for any of the maps, you will find your name permanently enshrined in the Hall Of Fame accessible through the main menu!

A Demo of the game is now available!

Although Beast Mode: Night of the Werewolf is not officially rated, its intended rating is Teen 13+ due to cartoon violence and crude humor.
